name: AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockMultiplier
title: AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockMultiplier
description: The function sets the audio sample clock multiplier of the CRF stream originat-ed by the Talker.
The nominal frequency of the audio sample clock is the clock frequency (see AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockFrequency) multiplied by the multiplier returned by this function.
